# Trimsalon 't Wolleke

## About
Trimsalon 't Wolleke is a professional dog grooming salon in Slijpe, Middelkerke, Belgium. Owner Alana Lams provides personalized grooming services for all dog breeds, working exclusively by appointment.

## Services
- Knippen & Trimmen (cutting & trimming)
- Wassen & Föhnen (washing & blow-drying)
- Nagels knippen (nail clipping)
- Oren & Ogen verzorging (ear & eye care)
- Puppy's eerste trim (puppy's first trim, from 12 weeks)
- Volledige verwenbeurt (complete pampering treatment)

## Contact
- Address: Schuddebeurzeweg 1, 8434 Slijpe, Middelkerke, Belgium
- Phone: +32 496 50 20 26
- Email: info@twolleke.be
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/32496502026
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=100082805782420
- Website: https://www.twolleke.be

## Appointments
By appointment only. Contact via WhatsApp or phone.
